title: scutellaria ovalifolia var. hirsuta
intro: Scutellaria ovalifolia var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy skullcap, is a variety of the Scutellaria ovalifolia plant, a perennial herb native to China. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The hairy skullcap is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of fever and flu. Herbal preparations of the hairy skullcap include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
